STREET INTERVIEW VIDEOS
–  GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
Street Interview AI Video — Full Production Guide
This guide walks you through the complete process of creating a realistic street interview video using the Master Prompt system. Follow each step exactly. By the end you will have a fully edited Facebook Reel ready to publish.
Tools you will need: Claude AI · Google Flow · CapCut
STEP 01 — Generate Script and Prompts | Claude AI
Open Claude AI in your browser.
Copy the entire Master Prompt and paste it into a new Claude chat.
Press enter and Claude will start asking you questions one at a time.
Question 01 — Which country is this interview based in? Type your country name. Example: USA
Question 02 — Which type of topic do you want to cover? Select a number from the list. Example: 4 (Breaking news)
Question 03 — Who do you want interviewed? Select a number from the list. Example: 4 (Middle aged man + young woman)
Question 04 — How do you want opinions split? Select a number from the list. Example: 1 (One positive + one negative)
Question 05 — Which city do you want? Select a number from the list. Example: 2 (Washington DC)
Question 06 — Which reporter do you want? Select a number from the list. Example: 1 (Black American female)
After all 6 questions, Claude searches the web and gives you 5 trending topic options.
Select one and Claude delivers:
Full Script
Image Prompts
Video Prompts
Caption Options
You now have everything needed to start production.
STEP 02 — Generate Images | Google Flow
You will create 5 images in this step. Each one builds on the last, so follow the order exactly.
Image 01 — Reporter Alone
Open Google Flow in a new tab.
Go back to Claude and copy Image Prompt 01 (Reporter alone on busy street).
Paste it into Google Flow.
Generate and pick the best result.
Download it and save as Image 01.
This is your Reporter Reference Image — you will use this in the next two steps.
Image 02 — Reporter + Interviewee 01
Copy Image Prompt 02 from Claude.
Open Google Flow.
Add Image 01 as a reference image.
Paste Image Prompt 02.
Generate and pick the best result.
Download it and save as Image 02.
Image 03 — Reporter + Interviewee 02
Copy Image Prompt 03 from Claude.
Open Google Flow.
Add Image 01 as a reference image (same Reporter image).
Paste Image Prompt 03.
Generate and pick the best result.
Download it and save as Image 03.
Image 04 — Interviewee 01 Solo (Mic Near Own Mouth)
Scroll to the end of the Master Prompt.
Find the small prompt under the Other Prompts section.
Copy it.
Open Google Flow.
Add Image 02 as a reference image.
Paste the small prompt.
Generate and pick the best result.
Download it and save as Image 04.
This image is Interviewee 01 holding the microphone near their own mouth — used when they are speaking.
Image 05 — Interviewee 02 Solo (Mic Near Own Mouth)
Use the same small prompt from the Other Prompts section.
Open Google Flow.
Add Image 03 as a reference image.
Paste the same small prompt.
Generate and pick the best result.
Download it and save as Image 05.
This image is Interviewee 02 holding the microphone near their own mouth.
All 5 images are now ready.
STEP 03 — Generate Videos | Google Flow
You will create all video clips for the Reel in this step. Each clip is 8 seconds, vertical 9:16.
First Interview Section
Video 01 — Reporter Intro
Open Google Flow Image to Video mode.
Upload Image 01 as the Start Frame.
Copy Video Prompt 01 from Claude.
Paste and generate.
Download the clip.
Video 02 — Reporter Asks Interviewee 01
Upload Image 02 as both Start Frame and End Frame.
Copy Video Prompt 02 from Claude.
Paste and generate.
Download the clip.
Video 03A — Interviewee 01 Answers PT1
Upload Image 04 as both Start Frame and End Frame.
Copy Video Prompt 03A from Claude.
Paste and generate.
Download the clip.
Video 03B — Interviewee 01 Answers PT2
Upload Image 04 as both Start Frame and End Frame.
Copy Video Prompt 03B from Claude.
Paste and generate.
Download the clip.
Video 04 — Reporter Follow Up
Upload Image 02 as both Start Frame and End Frame.
Copy Video Prompt 04 from Claude.
Paste and generate.
Download the clip.
Video 05 — Interviewee 01 Short Answer
Upload Image 04 as both Start Frame and End Frame.
Copy Video Prompt 05 from Claude.
Paste and generate.
Download the clip.
First interview section complete.
Second Interview Section
Repeat the same process for Interviewee 02 using Image 03 and Image 05 with the remaining video prompts from Claude.
Video 06 — Reporter Asks Interviewee 02 Upload Image 03 as Start + End Frame. Use Video Prompt 06.
Video 07A — Interviewee 02 Answers PT1 Upload Image 05 as Start + End Frame. Use Video Prompt 07A.
Video 07B — Interviewee 02 Answers PT2 Upload Image 05 as Start + End Frame. Use Video Prompt 07B.
Video 08 — Reporter Follow Up Upload Image 03 as Start + End Frame. Use Video Prompt 08.
Video 09 — Interviewee 02 Final Answer Upload Image 05 as Start + End Frame
